channel.title: PagesCMS Blog
channel.description: A modern blog powered by Astro and managed with PagesCMS — edit content directly from a beautiful UI.

item.title: Building a Blog with Astro and PagesCMS
item.description: A step-by-step walkthrough of creating a modern, fast blog with Astro and managing content through PagesCMS.

item.title: Getting Started with PagesCMS
item.description: Learn how PagesCMS makes content management simple by editing files directly in your GitHub repository.

item.title: Why Static Sites Are Still Winning in 2026
item.description: The case for static site generators remains stronger than ever — here is why Astro, Hugo, and Jekyll dominate modern web development.
